_comment: BGTG check #1 anchor, REFRAMED 2026-07-01 (ADR-0025 amendment / REFRAME-v1.2 R-2). Under the client model the Brain is an MCP/HTTP client: it binds to the accounting API CONTRACT, not internal @workspace/accounting TS symbols. This lists the accounting WRITE operations the Brain client calls; check-track-a.sh verifies each operationId exists in origin/main's OpenAPI spec. POPULATED WHEN #395 registers the accounting write endpoints via the endpoint-addition runbook (pnpm gen:all). Empty (version 0) = contract not yet defined = GATE-A A0 still blocked. Changing this file is a [contract-change] — record it in PROGRESS ## Decisions.
